app.name: RemoteCTRL
app.subtitle: Remote SSH Terminal Manager
app.description:
RemoteCTRL is a powerful remote access tool that puts a full SSH terminal, file browser, and process manager in your pocket.

Connect to any server via SSH and manage it from your iPhone or iPad — no VPN required.

Features:
• Unlimited SSH terminal sessions with full xterm-256color support
• Real-time terminal output with smooth scrolling
• File browser — upload, download, edit, and manage files via SFTP
• Process manager — monitor CPU/memory usage and kill runaway processes
• Command library — save and reuse your most-used commands
• Multi-profile support — switch between servers instantly
• Push notifications — get alerted on session disconnects and server health changes
• Biometric lock — secure your app with Face ID or Touch ID
• Dark mode — easy on the eyes during late-night maintenance

How it works:
1. Install the RemoteCTRL server on your machine (Windows, macOS, or Linux)
2. The server creates a secure Cloudflare tunnel — no port forwarding needed
3. Point your phone at the tunnel URL and connect
4. Manage your server from anywhere in the world

RemoteCTRL is open source and self-hosted. Your data never touches third-party servers.

screenshots.note: Take 6.7" iPhone screenshots after building. Required sizes: 1290x2796 (6.7"), 1242x2688 (6.5"), 2048x2732 (12.9" iPad)
suggested: Connection Profiles screen with server list
Terminal session with active SSH connection
